query: CREATE TABLE `cron_runs` (`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL, `job` varchar(80) NOT NULL, `status` enum('ok','skipped','error') NOT NULL, `message` text, `payload` json, `ran_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()), CONSTRAINT `cron_runs_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)); CREATE INDEX `status_idx` ON `articles` (`status`); CREATE INDEX `published_at_idx` ON `articles` (`published_at`);
